title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Urban Company Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Urban Company Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company Digital Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
